description: Kalshi resolution-grade (Tier A) vs predictive-only (Tier B) source lists. Only Tier A feeds the Kalshi-safe transcript store.

tier_a_resolution_grade.official_note: Campaign/official government domains and YouTube official channels only. Add campaign or press-office domains here when needed.

tier_b_predictive_only.description: Use for forecasting only; never for Kalshi resolution. Broader news, social, local TV, unofficial clips, third-party YouTube, etc.

content_types_we_parse: breaking-news writeups quoting the speaker verbatim
excluded_from_resolution_grade: local news not on the approved list
secondary databases that paraphrase rather than quote
